# Personal Data Protection Law

Jurisdiction: Saudi Arabia
Region: SA
Citation: Personal Data Protection Law
Authority: SDAIA
Source URL: https://sdaia.gov.sa/en/SDAIA/about/Documents/Personal%20Data%20English%20V2-23April2023-%20Reviewed-.pdf
Topics: lawful_basis, notice_transparency, consent, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer, retention_deletion, security_breach, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: Saudi PDPL, SDAIA, personal data, sensitive data, transfer outside the Kingdom, 沙特

## Summary
Saudi Arabia's personal data law with consent and other processing bases, data subject rights, sensitive data controls, transfer restrictions, breach duties, and regulator oversight.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide privacy information and process on a permitted basis.
- Protect sensitive data and data subject rights.
- Restrict transfers outside the Kingdom unless legal conditions are satisfied.
- Notify breaches and maintain appropriate security.
